name: ssh-keys-fanout
description: Distribute one or more SSH public keys to a target user on every host. Idempotent (trim/split/compare). Records install in ~/.lovable/ssh-keys-state.json on each host. Aggregates per-host ledger snapshots back to the controller for central audit.

inputs.KEY_FILE: Local path to a file containing one or more pubkey lines
inputs.TARGET_USER: Local user on each remote whose authorized_keys gets the keys (default: same as SSH login user)
inputs.USERMGMT_DIR: Path to scripts-linux/68-user-mgmt/ on each remote (default: /opt/68-user-mgmt)
